HEADER.TITLE: Al-Habbah .. Your guide to the trends in Saudi Arabia
HEADER.SUBTITLE: Discover the best places and premium locations in Saudi Arabia

SERVICES.DESC1: Al-Habbah is a Saudi platform specialized in delivering online restaurant orders.
SERVICES.DESC2: We ensure your food arrives hot and fresh, thanks to our efficient delivery network.
SERVICES.DESC3: Choose from a wide variety of restaurants and cuisines to satisfy every craving.

feature1.title: Discover everything that's trending
feature1.desc: The app brings you the latest trends in your area, from coffee shops, restaurants, and products to social media content. You won’t miss a thing!

feature2.title: Real reviews and experiences
feature2.desc: Check user reviews and actual experiences before visiting a place or buying a product.

feature3.title: Recommendations by your region
feature3.desc: It automatically shows you trends and hotspots based on your city or region, without you having to search.

feature4.title: Customized recommendations
feature4.desc: Based on your interactions and preferences, Al-Habbah suggests places and products similar to your interests using artificial intelligence.

feature5.title: Trusted application
feature5.desc: All content and sites are carefully reviewed and selected to ensure quality.

feature6.title: Share and be influential
feature6.desc: You can add your rating and recommendations to others, and be part of the trend industry in your region.

who-is-ready-desc: We're a Saudi team passionate about trends and local projects. We designed the Habba app to be a digital platform showcasing everything trending in the Kingdom. Our goal is to support merchants and highlight the gifts that make a difference.

JOIN_US.TITLE: Join Us
JOIN_US.DESC: We are happy to have you with us — Join us now.

TYPES_OF_HEBBA.TITLE: Types of Al-Habbah in the App

PLACE.TITLE: Place
PLACE.DESCRIPTION: Discover the best places and premium locations

PRODUCTS.TITLE: Products & Services
PRODUCTS.DESCRIPTION: Wide range of premium products and services

VIDEOS.TITLE: Trending Videos
VIDEOS.DESCRIPTION: Watch the latest trending videos and premium content

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Feel free to contact us
FAQ.FORM_PROMPT: Have another question? Don’t hesitate to ask us now!
FAQ.NAME: Your Name

QUESTIONS.A: Al-Habbah is an app that allows users to discover the latest and trending restaurants, cafes, products, and trending videos, based on the user's location and interests, to provide them with a fresh, trending experience at all times.

QUESTIONS.Q: How is the trend determined in the app?
QUESTIONS.A: The app relies on data analysis of interactions, ratings, and visit counts to display the most relevant content in your area.

QUESTIONS.Q: Is the app free to use?
QUESTIONS.A: Yes, the app is free for users. Some additional features or special offers may be available for partners.

QUESTIONS.Q: How can I review a place or product inside the app?
QUESTIONS.A: After visiting the coffee shop or product page inside the app, you can write your review and add a comment based on your experience.

QUESTIONS.Q: Can I suggest a new place or product?
QUESTIONS.A: Yes, you can suggest a new place or product through the app's suggestion section, and our team will review it.

QUESTIONS.Q: How do restaurants and cafes benefit from Al-Habbah?
QUESTIONS.A: Restaurants and cafes can connect with us through the app's contact section to include their place in the app.

QUESTIONS.Q: Can I share the trends with my friends?
QUESTIONS.A: Yes, the app allows you to share trending pages directly through social media platforms.

QUESTIONS.Q: How do I get notifications for new trends?
QUESTIONS.A: After enabling notifications, you will receive alerts for the latest trends in your area on a regular basis.

FOOTER.PROMOTIONAL_TEXT: All rights are reserved for the benefit of Ettigah © 2025

why-is-ready-desc: Al-Habbah reflects our vision of showcasing the latest and trending restaurants, cafes, products, and trending videos, based on the user's location and interests, to provide them with a fresh, trending experience at all times.
